course: Web Development with JavaScript and React

modules.name: JavaScript Fundamentals
modules.description: JavaScript syntax, variables, data types, and introductory data structures.

lessons.title: Getting Started with JavaScript
topics: REPL using browser console or online editors
Syntax rules and writing your first script

lessons.title: Variables and Data Types
topics: var, let, and const — declaration and scoping differences
Primitive data types: string, number, boolean, null, undefined

lessons.title: Data Structures — Arrays and Objects Intro

modules.name: Control Flow in JavaScript
modules.description: Conditional logic and loops for controlling program flow.

modules.name: Functions and Scope
modules.description: Writing reusable functions and understanding variable scope.

lessons.title: Function Scope, Hoisting, and Best Practices

modules.name: Objects and Object-Oriented Programming
modules.description: Object literals, constructors, prototypes, and the this keyword.

modules.name: Event Handling in JavaScript
modules.description: Browser events, event listeners, propagation, and delegation.

lessons.title: Understanding and Using Events
topics: Common browser events (click, submit, change, mouseover)
Basic event flow: target and handler

modules.name: The JavaScript DOM vs HTML DOM
modules.description: DOM tree structure, traversal, and dynamic modification.

lessons.title: Understanding the DOM and Traversing It
topics: What is the DOM? (HTML DOM vs JavaScript DOM API)
DOM tree structure (nodes, elements, attributes, text)

modules.name: Testing and Debugging JavaScript
modules.description: Error diagnosis, browser dev tools, and introductory testing practices.

lessons.title: Debugging JavaScript in the Browser
topics: Common JavaScript error types: syntax, reference, type
Using console.log() and typeof for tracing
Breakpoints, watch expressions, and call stack

modules.name: JavaScript with React & APIs
modules.description: React component architecture, props/state, API integration, and a capstone SPA project.

lessons.title: React Fundamentals and JavaScript Integration
topics: Introduction to React and component-based architecture

assessment.title: Capstone: Mini Single-Page Application
items: Build a Weather Dashboard or Product Browser using React + API
Functional components with API fetch logic
Conditional rendering based on loading/error states
